message:
test(e2e): add background tasks E2E test suite

Add comprehensive end-to-end tests for the MCP background tasks feature
(bd-og1). Tests cover the full lifecycle of task submission, progress
tracking, and completion.

Test coverage:
- workflow_task_submit_and_get: basic task submission and retrieval
- Task type registration (quick_task, progress_task, failing_task)
- TaskManager integration with server builder
- Capability negotiation (tasks capability check)

Infrastructure:
- setup_task_server() helper for task-enabled test servers
- Task handler registration patterns for different scenarios

Also syncs beads issue tracker and Cargo.lock.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
